metadata.notes: Country-level static dataset for first demo web application.

application_fee.notes: Fee‑paying student visa application fee for international students (from NZ$850) according to Immigration New Zealand’s fee‑paying student visa page【75522902615188†L220-L228】.

legal_work_hours_per_week.notes: Immigration NZ states that holders of a fee‑paying student visa can work up to 25 hours per week during the study period and full‑time in the holidays【75522902615188†L220-L228】.

application_fee.notes: Cost for the Post‑Study Work Visa is from NZ$1,670 according to Immigration New Zealand【188259477904794†L193-L205】.

duration_years.notes: Immigration NZ states that the post‑study work visa allows a stay of up to 3 years【188259477904794†L193-L205】.

application_fee.notes: The Accredited Employer Work Visa (skilled work visa) costs from NZ$1,540 according to Immigration New Zealand【139341506312171†L193-L204】.
The Skilled Migrant Category Resident Visa (pathway to permanent residency) costs from NZ$6,450 and allows indefinite stay【394874853847487†L194-L205】.

estimated_processing_years.notes: Processing time for the Skilled Migrant Category Resident Visa was estimated at 40–124 days (~0.11–0.34 years) in late 2025/early 2026【553685075055548†L160-L170】. A midpoint of 0.25 years is used.

annual_tuition_fee.notes: Average postgraduate tuition for international students in New Zealand ranges from NZ$20,000–45,000 per year; the midpoint (≈NZ$30k) is used【688300156527011†L126-L131】.

graduate_annual_salary.notes: PayScale reports the average salary for a graduate software engineer in New Zealand as NZ$63,553 in 2026【881061605075109†L22-L42】.

mid_level_annual_salary.notes: PayScale lists the average salary for a software engineer (mid‑level) in New Zealand as NZ$82,812 in 2026【634803593697076†L24-L45】.

senior_annual_salary.notes: Glassdoor and Indeed indicate senior software engineers in New Zealand earn around NZ$121k–150k, with an average base pay of roughly NZ$136k per year【275265064141094†L30-L46】.

annual_salary_growth_rate.notes: Human Resources Director (HRD) citing WTW reported that New Zealand employers expected salary increase budgets around 3.5% for 2026【528471229122750†L78-L100】.

hourly_wage.notes: MBIE announced that the adult minimum wage in New Zealand would rise to NZ$23.95 per hour from 1 April 2026【685006241193539†L646-L656】; this is used as the student hourly wage.

annual_salary.notes: New Zealand Shores summarises Stats NZ and Hays data, noting the average salary in New Zealand was about NZ$81,484 and median about NZ$69,836 in 2025【10080713797842†L430-L444】. The average (≈81k) is used as base spouse income.

effective_income_tax_rate.notes: New Zealand uses progressive tax brackets (10.5% up to $15,600; 17.5% up to $53,500; 30% up to $78,100; 33% up to $180,000; 39% thereafter)【239357032026526†L91-L98】. A simplified effective tax rate of ~24% is assumed for modelling.

employer_superannuation_rate.notes: Budget 2025 announced that from 1 April 2026 both employee and employer minimum KiwiSaver contribution rates increase from 3% to 3.5%【150334359600833†L74-L81】.

single_monthly.notes: Numbeo estimates monthly costs for a single person in New Zealand (excluding rent) at about NZ$1,708.8 in June 2026【373005563218753†L78-L83】.

couple_monthly.notes: No official couple estimate exists; a couple is assumed to spend roughly 1.9× a single person’s general costs. Based on Numbeo’s single person estimate of NZ$1,708.8【373005563218753†L78-L83】, the couple cost is approximated at NZ$3,200/month.

family_with_one_child_monthly.notes: Numbeo lists costs for a family of four at NZ$6,218.5 excluding rent【373005563218753†L78-L83】. A family with one child (three people) is assumed to require ~75% of a four‑person family cost, giving ~NZ$4,700/month.

single_monthly.notes: Average of 1‑bedroom apartment rents in city centre (NZ$1,895.51) and outside centre (NZ$1,658.99) on Numbeo June 2026【373005563218753†L189-L195】.

family_monthly.notes: Average of 3‑bedroom apartment rents in city centre (NZ$2,997.62) and outside centre (NZ$2,622.92) from Numbeo【373005563218753†L189-L195】.

monthly_cost_per_child.notes: Numbeo’s childcare section lists the private full‑day preschool/Kindergarten monthly fee for one child at NZ$1,515.69【373005563218753†L171-L175】.

public_transport_monthly.notes: Numbeo lists the cost of a monthly public transport pass at NZ$200 (range NZ$105–230)【373005563218753†L160-L175】.

monthly_cost.notes: Massey University’s Studentsafe insurance premium for one month is NZ$74.90; the full academic year premium is NZ$899【995503553405343†L132-L148】.

used_car_purchase_price.notes: 2 Cheap Cars’ 2026 guide notes that the most competitive price bracket for used cars in New Zealand is NZ$8k–10k, with many hybrid hatchbacks and compact cars in this range【900914878106039†L205-L229】. An average of NZ$9k is used as the purchase price.

annual_insurance.notes: Quashed’s car insurance guide (updated April 2026) states that the average cost of comprehensive car insurance in New Zealand is about NZ$1,267 per year【20824780541817†L41-L46】.

annual_fuel.notes: MoneyHub’s car ownership guide suggests that a typical driver spends around NZ$3,000 per year on fuel【499644679155693†L3667-L3671】.

annual_maintenance.notes: MoneyHub notes that car maintenance costs are roughly NZ$1,000 per year for a typical driver【499644679155693†L3667-L3671】.

annual_depreciation_rate.notes: Car is treated as a depreciating asset; a 15% annual depreciation rate is assumed. Dave Allen Motors’ 2026 guide notes that running costs vary by vehicle type【259586428429284†L146-L154】, and depreciation is a significant component.

car_loan_interest_rate.notes: AA Money advertises car loan interest rates from 9.40% p.a. with fixed terms of 1–5 years【241837139183327†L76-L78】.

inflation_rate.notes: Stats NZ’s Consumer Price Index shows annual inflation of 3.1% in the March 2026 quarter【780667652852609†screenshot】.

savings_interest_rate.notes: Canstar’s January 2026 review of high‑interest savings accounts reports that the average rate across high‑interest savings accounts was about 1.88% p.a.【76501758899679†L118-L122】.

investment_return_rate.notes: UniSaver’s statement of investment policy notes that the Balanced fund aims to deliver returns about 3% per annum above inflation over 10 years【20261503224504†L134-L149】. With CPI ~3%, this implies a nominal return of ~6%.

nzd_to_lkr_exchange_rate.notes: Wise’s currency history page notes that the average NZD to LKR rate over the last six months (to 27 June 2026) was approximately 186.0944 LKR per NZD【159385712252782†L169-L172】.

education_loan_interest_rate.notes: Ceylon Open Campus’ 2025 guide lists typical education loan rates in Sri Lanka: Bank of Ceylon Vidya Loan 10–12% p.a., People’s Bank 10–13% p.a., NSB 9–11% p.a., and private bank schemes 14–17% p.a. An average rate of 12% is used【285959173420324†L53-L59】.

migration_loan_interest_rate.notes: For relocation or migration loans, a standard personal or car loan rate is assumed. AA Money advertises secured car loans from 9.40% p.a. with fixed terms【241837139183327†L76-L78】.

loans_and_debt.notes: If cash becomes negative, convert it into explicit debt instead of silently allowing negative cash.

sources.notes: Store URLs or citation labels here.
